name: Golda's Brisket
recipeIngredient: 8 pounds beef brisket, single cut, cut into 2 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the brisket in the roasting pans on both sides, searing the meat.
Lower flame and cook meat, covered with foil, for 1 1/2 hours.
2. Slice the meat into thin slices and return to the pans. Add 1 can of tomato juice
(Sacramento brand) plus half of the carrots, potatoes, onions, and garlic to each roasting pan.
3. Cover and cook an additional 1 1/2 hours or until vegetables are soft and ready to serve.
